B

balloonHeapSize() - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the size in bytes occupied by all the long[] which back up active (i.e. inflated) Balloons.
balloonSize() - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon.Balloon
Returns the inflated size in bytes of this Balloon.
balloonSize() - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the size in bytes of all active (i.e. inflated) Balloons.

D

deflate(JBalloon.Balloon) - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Deflates the Balloon b and returns the backing long[].
deflateAll() - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Deflates all currently active Balloons.

G

getInstance() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Initializes and returns the singleton JBalloon instance.

H

heapBase() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the base address of the Java object heap.
heapSize() - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon.Balloon
Returns the size in bytes occupied by the long[] which backs up this Balloon.
heapSize() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the Java object heap size in bytes.

I

inflate(long) - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Creates and inflates a new JBalloon.Balloon with size rounded up to such that it spans at least one system page size (i.e.
inflate(long[]) - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Creates and inflates a new JBalloon.Balloon backed up by array.
io.simonis.jballoon - package io.simonis.jballoon
 

J

JBalloon - Class in io.simonis.jballoon
A utility class which allows Java code to instantly release a part of the Java heap memory to the OS and reclaim it back whenever necessary.
JBalloon.Balloon - Class in io.simonis.jballoon
A lightweight handle class for managing memory balloons.

L

longArrayOffset() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the offset in bytes of the first element in a long[] relatively to the arrays address in the Java heap.

M

mincoreHeapSize() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the size in bytes occupied by the Java heap as returned by the mincore(2) C-library call.

O

objectHeaderSize() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the object header size of a Java object.

P

pageSize() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the default system page size (i.e.

R

regionSize() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the region size of the current Garbage Collector.
rssHeapSize() - Static method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon
Returns the size in bytes occupied by the Java heap as accounted for in the /proc/self/pagemap file.

T

toString() - Method in class io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon.Balloon
